name: NATO (North Atlantic Treaty Organization)

overview.value: The North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) is an intergovernmental military alliance between 32 member states, 30 in Europe and 2 in North America. It was established on April 4, 1949, through the signing of the North Atlantic Treaty, and is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.

focus.value: Space as an operational domain for the alliance, including the APSS initiative (19 Allies contributing over USD 1 billion to leverage commercial and national space assets) and the HALO networked-constellation initiative

notes: Added 2026-07-12 per Florian (anti-spoof: registry-recorded website gives nato.int pages a first-party path for NATO's own program statements; same pattern as the CSA entry, 2026-07-08). Tracked for its space activities only; the profile does not cover the alliance's non-space work.

events.headline: Eight NATO Allies launch the HALO networked-constellation initiative at the Ankara summit forum
